creator: Andre.Albsmeier@mchp.siemens.de
text:
1.) fxtv still fails to run the convert script when doing video
    capture and PATH doesn't contain a dot. This was tried to fix
    but the fix doesn't work.

2.) When running fxtv on a 4.1-STABLE system with an SB AWE32
    card and the pcm driver, the only supported sound recording
    format is 8 Bit unsigned. In this case the conversion script
    fails because sox can't doesn't create the correct output file
    for mpeg_musicin.

Fix: 1.)

2.)
How-To-Repeat: 
1.) Capture video without a dot in the path.

2.) Capture video on 4.1-STABLE system with an SB AWE32 and the
    pcm sound driver.
